name.  These policy definitions are expected to be
referenced (by name) in policy chains specified in
import or export configuration statements.

cisco-l2vpn-routing-policy:evpn-route-ty.description: List of defined evpn-route-type sets for use in policies. (list)

items.description: <0-11> List of routes in the evpn-route-type set. (leaf-list)

name.description:
Name of the evpn-route-type set; this is used as a label
to reference the set in match conditions. (leaf)

cisco-l2vpn-routing-policy:rd-set.description: List of defined RD sets for use in policies. (list)

items.description: ASN:nn or IPV4-address:nn,VPN Route Distinguisher; List of addresses in the RD set. (leaf-list)

name.description:
Name of the RD set; this is used as a label
to reference the set in match conditions. (leaf)

cisco-l2vpn-routing-policy:etag-set.description: List of defined etag sets for use in policies. (list)

name.description:
Name of the etag set; this is used as a label
to reference the set in match conditions. (leaf)

items.description: <1-4294967295> Value of the tag set member. Should match to a color value. (leaf-list)

name.description:
Name of the tag set; this is used as a label to
reference the set in actions conditions. (leaf)

cisco-l2vpn-routing-policy:policy-defini.description:
List of top-level policy definitions, keyed by unique
name.  These policy definitions are expected to be
referenced (by name) in policy chains specified in
import or export configuration statements. (list)

name.description:
Name of the top-level policy definition; this name
is used in references to the current policy. (leaf)

statement.description:
Policy statements group conditions and actions
within a policy definition.  They are evaluated in
the order specified. (list)

conditions.description:
Condition statements for the current policy
statement. (non-presence)

ext-community-set-ref.description: References a defined extended community set by name. Creating routing-policy tag-set is mandatory and needs to be mapped here. (leaf)

set-ext-community.description:
Action to set the extended community attributes of the
 route, along with options to modify how the community is
 modified. Extended communities may be set using an inline
 list OR a reference to an existing defined set (but not
 both). (presence)

actions.description:
Top-level container for policy action
statements. (non-presence)

fields.description: optionally identify specific data nodes in response
